These remain allegations; no court has ruled on the fair-use question in","score":0.7781275,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2024/08/01/ai-music-startup-suno-response-riaa-lawsuit","title":"AI music startup Suno claims training model on copyrighted music is 'fair use' | TechCrunch","content":"Following therecent lawsuit filed by the Recording Industry Association of America (RIAA) against music generation startups Udio and Suno, Suno admitted in a court filing on Thursday that it did, in fact, train its AI model using copyrighted songs. The RIAA filed the lawsuit against Udio and Suno on June 24, alleging that the companies trained their models using copyrighted music. “It is no secret that the tens of millions of recordings that Suno’s model was trained on presumably included recordings whose rights are owned by the Plaintiffs in this case,” the filing states. Suno CEO and co-founder Mikey Shulman continued on in a blog post published the same day as the legal filing, saying “We train our models on medium- and high-quality music we can find on the open internet… Much of the open internet indeed contains copyrighted materials, and some of it is owned by major record labels.”.","score":0.76427686,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.techtimes.com/articles/318471/20260616/ai-music-copyright-lawsuit-suno-discovery-shows-millions-songs-july-ruling-nears.htm","title":"AI Music Copyright Lawsuit: Suno Discovery Shows Millions of Songs, July Ruling Nears","content":"# AI Music Copyright Lawsuit: Suno Discovery Shows Millions of Songs, July Ruling Nears. #### Fingerprinting revealed millions of songs in Suno training data. A federal court is weeks away from a hearing that may determine whether training an AI on copyrighted recordings — and, critically, where those recordings came from — is legal under U.S. copyright law. The answer will matter not just to Sony Music and the two AI startups it is still fighting, but to every company that has ever built a generative model on data it did not license. Its copyright cases against Suno, filed in the U.S. District Court for the District of Massachusetts, and against Udio, filed in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of New York, are still active. ### How Audio Fingerprinting Found Millions of Copyrighted Songs in Suno's Training Data.","score":0.72605723,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.digitalmusicnews.com/2026/06/01/suno-lawsuit-training-dispute","title":"Suno Fights to Conceal Training Figure Amid Major Label Lawsuit","content":"# How Many Tracks Were Used to Train Suno? ## **Exactly how many tracks were used to train Suno’s generative models? #### In the opposite corner, Suno in a follow-up filing framed its request as pertaining to “a single figure” – referring to “the total volume of audio files” ingested for training. “[T]he sole information Suno seeks to impound is the total *number* of audio files allegedly used to train its model,” the defendant wrote. “If competitors learned the volume of Suno’s training data—a core component of the tool has [sic] Suno built—they could use that information to replicate and benchmark against Suno’s models, infer aspects of Suno’s training and development process, and potentially optimize their models to unfairly compete with Suno’s by leveraging Suno’s confidential business information,” the platform continued. Similarly, Suno co-founder and CTO Georg Kucsko in an almost-verbatim declaration expressed the belief that rival AI developers could capitalize on the training number “to benchmark their own systems against Suno’s model, infer aspects of Suno’s training and development approach, and” more.","score":0.6708892,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.billboard.com/pro/suno-ai-training-copyright-lawsuit-production-music-firm","title":"Suno Faces AI Training Copyright Lawsuit From Production ...","content":"Suno has been sued again over the training data powering its successful AI music generator — this time by production music licensing library","score":0.5660431,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.01,"request_id":"a2b9f0ed-3eed-4884-9ee9-4841ea1f9036"}
